parsed.summary: This commit renames the npm scope and adds an interactive menu to the /glm:setup command when already configured. The changes are confined to configuration files (package.json, plugin manifests), documentation (CHANGELOG.md, release_card.md), and a markdown command template (commands/setup.md). There are no runtime code changes, no logic that handles auth/data/external calls, and no executable code paths — the setup.md is a Claude slash-command prompt template, not executable code. No material defects, silent failures, or security concerns are defensible from the diff.
